# freeswitch_conference_profile (Data Source)

Looks up an existing conference profile by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Reuse a shared profile owned by another Terraform state.
data "freeswitch_conference_profile" "video_grid" {
  name = "video-grid"
}

resource "freeswitch_conference_room" "team_b" {
  name    = "team-b"
  number  = "3502"
  domain  = "192.168.48.143"
  context = "company"
  profile = data.freeswitch_conference_profile.video_grid.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `auto_record` (String)
- `moh_sound` (String)
- `rate` (Number)
- `video_canvas_size` (String)
- `video_fps` (Number)
- `video_layout` (String)
- `video_mode` (String)
